chapters.translation_note: Prototype scripture reader dataset for Genesis.

verses.text: In the beginning God created the heaven and the earth.
And the earth was without form, and void; and darkness was upon the face of the deep.
And God said, Let there be light: and there was light.

chapters.translation_note: Prototype scripture reader dataset for Exodus.

verses.text: Now these are the names of the children of Israel, which came into Egypt.
